raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identifies several logical consistency issues, including the non-stationarity argument and unsupported superlatives, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names prior work (static lead-time partitioning) but does not map against multiple works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags missing provenance for FourCastNet-Precip and unclear temporal splits, but does not audit every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for several claims (non-stationarity argument, tail-conditional skill) and identifies areas where evidence is lacking.",
    "RX.3": "The agent mostly stays within scope with one drift (flood-risk framing), but does not cover exactly the agreed active set.",
    "RX.4": "The agent flags potential downstream harm (mis-routing extreme events) and suggests reporting conditional CRPS metrics.",
    "RX.5": "The agent notes missing provenance for FourCastNet-Precip, but does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.75
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies several logical consistency issues, including the non-stationarity argument and unsupported superlatives, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names prior work (static lead-time partitioning) but does not map against multiple works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing provenance for FourCastNet-Precip and unclear temporal splits, but does not audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for several claims (non-stationarity argument, tail-conditional skill) and identifies areas where evidence is lacking.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stays within scope with one drift (flood-risk framing), but does not cover exactly the agreed active set.
rationale.RX.4: The agent flags potential downstream harm (mis-routing extreme events) and suggests reporting conditional CRPS metrics.
rationale.RX.5: The agent notes missing provenance for FourCastNet-Precip, but does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
